description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed within a rectangular walled lot, featuring a paved driveway and a double-gate entry. The house has a flat roof with multiple terraces and balconies, and its exterior is finished in a clean white color with large, rectangular windows that provide ample natural light. The property is landscaped with several small trees and shrubs, both along the perimeter and within the yard, adding greenery to the urban setting. The main entrance is accentuated by a covered porch and a pathway leading from the gate, while the garage is integrated into the front facade. The overall design is geometric and minimalist, with straight lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall, providing privacy and a clear separation from the street.
description: A modern, two-story white house with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a low wall and featuring a paved driveway and garage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, double gates, driveway, garage, and landscaped yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the house's depth, flat roof terraces, and the boundary wall with trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the landscaped yard and wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the rear and side of the house, with more trees and the boundary wall enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and some floor-to-ceiling glass sections
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch, double gates, paved path, and minimalistic design with no ornate elements.
